title: To study the effect of lactate based  vs acetate based maintenance  fluid on the acid-base  and biochemical status of the patient undergoing  major abdominal surgery.
condition: Effect of the type of intravenous fluid on the acid-base  and biochemical status of the patient post operatively,
inclusion_criteria: All  ASA ( American society of anesthesiologist ) grade I and  grade II  adult patients undergoing  intra-abdominal surgery
exclusion_criteria: 1-Patients with perioperative electrolyte and metabolic imbalance and those on diuretic therapy
